subtasks.description: List the top 5 publishers by total spend in fiscal year 2024, with their total spend amounts.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.sql: SELECT publisher, SUM(amount_usd) as total_spend FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2024-01-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY publisher ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 5
